name: BIOREGENX, INC.
business: The Company engages in research, development, and commercialization of dietary supplements, medical devices, software, and contactless diagnostic technologies. Products include Endocalyx Pro (dietary supplement), GlycoCheck (medical device and software), DocSun AI Engine (contactless diagnostic technology), and Findit.com (social media platform).

exposures.sentence: MVHS also manufactures and distributes the patented GlycoCheck software and Class 1 medical device.
The DocSun AI Engine integrates advanced ballistocardiography, which can detect an individual's heartbeat without touch, and photoplethysmography, a method that uses light to track the flow of blood.
NuLife is currently developing health and wellness apps with a technology company which will provide DNA and epigenetics testing products and services.
Endocalyx Pro is a dietary supplement targeting microvascular capillary health.
DocSun combines three technologies in the DocSun Artificial Intelligence (AI) Engine.
Findit.com operates as a Social Media Content Management Platform, that includes its own interactive search engine.

catalysts.sentence: The TruScan.Ai mobile app is anticipated for release in the third quarter of 2027.

catalysts.event: Commercialization of DocSun SDK in fleet and EVs
catalysts.sentence: Initial revenues stem from the testing of DocSun's SDK in fleet and electric vehicles (EV's) amongst other applications, with commercialization slated to begin in late third quarter or early fourth quarter.

tamClaims.claim: Healthcare services market valued at $9.25 trillion in 2025
tamClaims.sentence: In 2025, the healthcare services market was valued at approximately $9.25 trillion, reflecting a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.4% from $8.77 trillion in 2024.

tamClaims.claim: Global telehealth market valued at $181.41 billion in 2025
tamClaims.sentence: In 2025, the global telehealth market was valued at $181.41 billion and is projected to grow to $219.31 billion in 2026, with an anticipated CAGR of 24.6%, reaching $1,272.81 billion by 2034.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. telehealth market valued at $51.5 billion in 2025
tamClaims.sentence: The U.S. telehealth market alone is expected to be valued at $51.5 billion in 2025 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 23.8% from 2025 to 2030.
